json_data.title: The Major
json_data.description: Complete the following five courses. Neuroscience M101A must be complete with a grade of C– or better. Physiological Science 111A and Psychology 115 cannot be substituted for Neuroscience M101A.

options.title: Required Core
courses: CHEM 153A - Biochemistry: Introduction to Structure, Enzymes, and Metabolism
NEUROSC M101A - Neuroscience: From Molecules to Mind—Cellular and Systems Neuroscience
NEUROSC M101B - Neuroscience: From Molecules to Mind—Molecular and Developmental Neuroscience
NEUROSC M101C - Neuroscience: From Molecules to Mind—Behavioral and Cognitive Neuroscience
NEUROSC 102 - Introduction to Functional Anatomy of Central Nervous System
